title: Milestone Dashboard — Template
what_it_is: A reusable template (ratified CANONICAL 2026-07-06, adapted from Houston) for per-milestone dashboard pages: a title line with emoji/wave/closing-gate/target-date, an issue-board `linear_view` embed scoped to the milestone, a `linear_issue` card for the closing gate, and just-in-time gate-coverage doctrine (Waiting-not-Ready when blocked-by links are absent). It is not itself a plan — it is the recipe + placeholder reference + instantiation steps (docmost-cli page duplicate/move/block) for producing live milestone-status pages under the delivery overview.
overlaps: No conflict with the 4-phase Delivery Program (5eFdxN3edd) or the new parallel-build-plan.md — this is dashboard-authoring machinery, not a competing plan. It is already load-bearing: all 15 M0–M14 dashboards under the Orvex Studio Delivery overview (cLWfnuXCWb) were instantiated from this template on 2026-07-12, and 5eFdxN3edd's Phase 0 item 3 ('close the remaining gates') operates against that same M0–M14 gate ladder these dashboards render. One real defect: the template's own body text is stale — it still says the Linear project 'Orvex AI Studio' 'has no milestones yet' and milestone codes/gates are 'TBD — set during the Studio Act-1 run,' but per 5eFdxN3edd's 2026-07-13 evidence sweep the milestones already exist and most gates (M1,M3,M4,M6,M7,M8,M9,M10,M12,M13, and M5 as of that morning) are already Done. Minor secondary overlap: cLWfnuXCWb's own 'How to populate this roadmap' section restates the same instantiate-a-dashboard steps that live authoritatively in this template's section 3 — harmless duplication since cLWfnuXCWb links to this page as the source, but worth trimming to a pointer only.
